value.found_quote: Prompt Caching can reduce latency by up to 80% and input token costs by up to 90%. Prompt Caching works automatically on all your API requests (no code changes required) and has no additional fees associated with it.
value.rationale: The page is OpenAI's official documentation page dedicated entirely to "Prompt caching," explicitly describing it as a feature that caches repeated/common prompt prefixes to reduce latency (up to 80%) and cost (up to 90% on input tokens). This directly substantiates the claim that OpenAI offers prompt/context caching to cut latency and cost. The feature is described as generally available (active), working automatically with no extra fees, and enabled for all recent models (gpt-4o and newer).
